data.name: Indenture
data.detailed_description:
Narrative Exploration:
Dive into the story of the Nishimura family, a once-influential Kendo dojo lineage now facing a tragic secret. Explore the quiet countryside setting and uncover the haunting past that threatens to destroy the family’s reputation and dojo.



Choice and Consequence:
Players make crucial decisions that significantly impact the storyline and the fate of the Nishimura family. Navigate moral dilemmas and strategic choices that influence relationships, unlock different scenes, and lead to multiple possible endings. Every choice matters.



Relationship Management:
Manage complex relationships within the Nishimura family and with other key characters. Build trust, foster forbidden romances, or create rivalries based on your choices. Relationship dynamics play a crucial role in uncovering secrets and driving the plot forward.



Unlocking Scenes:
Progress through the game to unlock explicit scenes and significant story moments that delve deeper into the family's dark secrets and intense emotional experiences.
data.about_the_game:
Narrative Exploration:

data.short_description: Uncover the secrets of the Nishimura family, renowned for their dojo expertise. Beneath their legacy lies a web of dark secrets, forbidden love, and intense encounters. Dive into their story, unraveling the truth behind the family's facade in a narrative filled with passion and intrigue.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and Above
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
